name: nexus-mobility
description: Nexus Mobility Dashboard - Smart City Transit System

scripts.build: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path www) { Remove-Item -Path www -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path www; Copy-Item index.html,tracker.html,driver.html,driver-portal.html,admin.html,login-app.js,tracker-app.js,driver-console.js,driver-app.js,admin-app.js www/ -Force; Copy-Item components,utils www/ -Recurse -Force"
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android: npm run sync && npm run open:android
